international.use: USD/CAD/GBP/EUR — Western clients; include in invoices/pitch follow-ups

strategy.positioning: Premium one-day micro-builds for Western small businesses: India-grade cost, MNC-grade delivery.
strategy.note: Boss directive 2026-07-20: pitch paying markets abroad first — Western clients close faster and pay in USD/CAD/GBP. Time-zone aware outreach (their business hours), CAN-SPAM/CASL/GDPR-compliant 1:1 pitches only.
strategy.channelFirstRule: Boss directive 2026-07-20: CHANNEL BEFORE DEMO. A business only counts as a lead if it has a directly reachable public channel (verified email OR WhatsApp/textable mobile). Phone-only / placeholder-email businesses do NOT qualify — never build a demo or spend effort on a lead we can't deliver a pitch to. L-004 and L-007 were phone-only mistakes and are deprioritized.

pricingByCountry.note: One-time, no monthly fees, live in 48h. Localized per market for a better conversion ratio; boss can override per deal.

strategy.targetingPriority: Boss directive 2026-07-20: NO-WEBSITE FIRST. #1 target = businesses with NO website at all (only a Google Business / Facebook / Instagram / directory listing) — biggest need, highest buy-intent, they actually pay. #2 = weak/outdated existing sites. Still CHANNEL-FIRST: the lead must be reachable by a verified public email, WhatsApp/textable mobile, or Facebook DM. Harvest no-website leads public data from their Google/FB/IG listing. Industry weighting (Manager 2026-07-20): barbershops, pet groomers, cafes and small mobile trades are the richest no-website veins — weight the Finder there.

targets.note: Pitch $2000/day of proposal value so conversions land $100+/day minimum.

brain.identity: I am the Vision Tech Agency OS. I find reachable leads, build each a full real-data website, draft personalized pitches, and learn what converts. Boss (Vivek) approves the sends; I do the rest around the clock.
brain.focus: 24 leads (20 reachable). New batch built. Boss: Approve the email/WhatsApp leads in-window + DM the FB-only ones. Sends still the bottleneck.
playbook: NO-WEBSITE FIRST: prioritize businesses with no website at all (Google/FB/IG listing only) — they need us most and buy fastest. Weak existing sites are second.
CHANNEL FIRST: only a business with a verified reachable email or WhatsApp/textable mobile counts as a lead. Never build for phone-only businesses.
DEMO = a full, finished, real-data website (SiteTemplate engine or bespoke route) — never a thin placeholder skeleton, never invented prices or reviews.
Clean light theme for most local services; dark/bold for barbers and night trades.
NO auto-send: pitches are drafted; email goes out only via the admin Approve & Send click (safety layer + CASL/CAN-SPAM/GDPR).
Western markets first (USD/CAD/GBP/AUD); India only via existing network.
Time-zone aware: pitch each lead inside their local business hours.
Weight the Finder toward barbershops, pet groomers, cafes and small mobile trades — the richest no-website veins. Quality over volume: do not out-run the send queue.

learnings.insight: The bottleneck is SEND-THROUGHPUT, not lead supply: 18 reachable leads but only 2 pitched, 0 replies. The org builds far faster than pitches get approved and sent. More leads won’t help until sends go out.
learnings.evidence: 20 leads / 20 sites live; only L-005 & L-006 (both UK) actually sent.

learnings.insight: Barbershops and pet groomers over-index heavily in the no-website segment — the richest veins for the Finder. Cafes and small mobile trades are next.
learnings.evidence: Most no-website finds are barbers (Blades, Village, Grooming Lounge, Olde Tyme, Savannah’s) or groomers (Lakeside, Michelle’s, Wag-A-Long, Noonies).

learnings.insight: The hottest buyer is a business with NO website, not one with a weak site. No web presence = highest need + buy-intent. Build their first site from their Google/Facebook listing.
learnings.evidence: Boss directive: focus on who will actually pay.

learnings.insight: Every reachable lead should be on the engine template, not the old thin config — consistency of quality matters as much as the pitch.
learnings.evidence: Upgraded the final 3 (L-002/003/008) so all 12 match the new standard.

learnings.insight: Price is now localized per market (US $299, CA CA$349, UK £199, AU A$349) instead of a flat $299 — local currency + a sharper UK number should lift conversion.
learnings.evidence: Boss directive: set per-country rates for better conversion ratio.

learnings.insight: Mobile trades (detailers, groomers) and studios almost always hide pricing — 'no prices published' is the single most common, most pitchable weakness.
learnings.evidence: 5 of 6 cycle-2 leads had zero or vague pricing; the hook writes itself.

learnings.insight: Thin config-template demos read as flimsy and won't convert; a full real-data site is the standard now.
learnings.evidence: Boss feedback + 3 flagship rebuilds (Blades of Norwich, Drive Automatic, Best Little Hair House).

learnings.insight: Phone-only leads waste build effort — qualify the reachable channel BEFORE building anything.
learnings.evidence: L-004 and L-007 were phone-only; deprioritized after building demos we can't deliver.

learnings.insight: A reusable SiteProfile + SiteTemplate turns one data object into a full site — the key to ~50/day scale.
learnings.evidence: Best Little Hair House rebuilt to flagship quality from data alone (commit c19ad87).

proposedAgents.name: Closer
proposedAgents.why: When a lead replies or says yes, no agent drafts the reply/follow-up or runs the domain-attach close (spin up their Vercel project + attach their domain). The current five stop at ‘sent’.

proposedAgents.name: Follow-up
proposedAgents.why: Sent leads with no reply after 2-3 days get no gentle, polite follow-up draft — a proven conversion lever. Drafts only, boss approves.
proposedAgents.trigger: status pitched + N days with no reply

todayIdea.title: One-page booking micro-site for Western local services
todayIdea.pitch: Local service businesses (salons, detailers, barbers, mechanics, groomers) in CA/US/UK/AU lose ready-to-buy customers because their sites have no prices, no reviews and no booking. We ship a mobile-perfect one-pager — services + prices, reviews, one-tap Book Now — live in 48 hours.
todayIdea.buildPlan: Single Next.js page per client, config-driven, deployed on Vercel; Book Now opens their preferred channel (existing booking tool, SMS, WhatsApp or phone).
todayIdea.targetNiche: Service businesses in USA, Canada (Kelowna base), UK and Australia — priced $299; India only via existing network

agents.name: Finder
agents.role: Runs non-stop finding the best-converting NO-WEBSITE, channel-reachable leads
agents.note: Found + built 4 fresh no-website leads (Ballarat barber, Kamloops groomer, Dubuque barber, Sunderland groomer). 1 email, 1 WhatsApp, 2 FB-DM.

agents.name: Monitor
agents.role: Watches site health, demo links, API and pipeline 24/7
agents.note: Health + all demo 200s + pipeline flags. Alerts the Manager on any break.

agents.name: Builder
agents.role: Turns fresh lead data into a full real-data website continuously
agents.note: Built 4 new sites from the Finder batch (L-021..L-024). All live.

agents.name: Manager
agents.role: The brain — takes all data, learns, changes the playbook, spins up new agents when needed
agents.note: If a market/price/pitch is not converting, it rewrites the strategy and can create new specialist agents.

agents.name: Reporter
agents.role: Tells the boss what is new every 30 minutes
agents.note: Rolling digest of new leads, sites, sends, replies and Manager changes.

leads.pitchEmailSubject: A small refresh for the Best Little Hair House?
leads.pitchEmailBody:
Hi Best Little Hair House team,

I'm Vivek, founder of Vision Tech — we're your neighbours up Highway 97 in Kelowna. I spent a while on your site this week. Any salon with roots back to Sally's Hair Port in 1978 clearly knows how to keep clients for life — but the page still shows the COVID-era mask protocols, your cuts, colour, extensions and piercing have no prices listed, and booking hands people off to a separate Vagaro page.

We build one-page booking micro-sites for local businesses: your services with prices, your best reviews, mobile-perfect, and one clear Book Now button that opens whatever you prefer — Vagaro, text, or the phone. Live in 48 hours, CA$349 one-time, no monthly fees.

If this sounds interesting, just reply and tell me what you'd change — we'll shape it exactly how you want and handle everything end to end.

Warm regards,
Vivek Vora
Founder & CEO, Vision Tech — Kelowna, BC
madvision.tech | info@madvision.tech

P.S. We went ahead and sketched yours already: https://madvision.tech/demo/best-little-hair-house — tap around, that's your name on it.

If this isn't for you, reply 'no thanks' and we won't write again.

reports.summary: Finder batch: 4 new no-website leads in fresh cities (Colossal Barbers Ballarat, Fancy Fur Babies Kamloops, Mr. Cadillac Cutz Dubuque, Lady & The Tramp Groomers Sunderland) — each got its first-ever site. 24 leads now; Lady & Tramp is email+WhatsApp, Colossal WhatsApp, other two FB-DM.

NO-WEBSITE cycle (boss's smart pivot): found 6 businesses that have NO website at all (Google/FB listings only) — the hottest segment. Built each their first-ever site from public data and drafted a 'you have no website — here's one' pitch (4 email, 2 Facebook-DM). Now 16 reachable leads. These need us most and buy fastest.

Afternoon builder block: upgraded the last 3 thin-config demos (Next Level Detailing, Boise Detail, Noonies Pet Care) to full real-data engine sites from their public listings. All 12 reachable leads now have engine-quality demos with per-country pricing. Outreach flow stays classifier-blocked, so pitches await admin Approve & Send in each lead time-window (UK open now; NA opens 20:30 IST).

Cycle 2 shipped: generator engine (SiteProfile+SiteTemplate) live, 6 new channel-verified leads (L-009..L-014) each with a full real-data site + drafted pitch, plus the self-aware/self-learning Brain and a proactive Friday. 12 reachable leads, ~$3,588 pipeline. All sends await boss approval.

MIDDAY CONSOLIDATED CYCLE (14:59 IST): Morning+midday crons merged into one decision — NO new leads added this round. Reason: 6 contactable leads already meet the daily quota and ZERO pitches have been sent yet; stacking inventory before the shop opens is waste. Send-first discipline. BOSS ACTION NOW: UK send window is OPEN until 18:30 IST — Approve & Send L-005 (Blades of Norwich) and L-006 (Drive Automatic); both have flagship demo pages ready to impress. Tonight 20:30+ IST: send L-001/L-002/L-003 (North America). Payments fully operational (Wise international link + India UPI). Next scout round runs after today's sends go out.

FIRST LIVE CYCLE COMPLETE (overnight run): 8 real leads researched across Canada (Penticton, Vernon), USA (Boise, Chattanooga), UK (Norwich, Brighton) and Australia (Geelong, Newcastle) — every website personally verified, 6 have published business emails. Personalized pitches drafted for all 6. Boss: open the outreach queue and Approve & Send each pitch during the lead's business hours (send windows are in each lead's notes — UK leads 1:30-6:30pm IST, North America 8:30pm-2:30am IST, Australia 4:30-9:30am IST). Two leads have no public email (phone/form only).

STRATEGY PIVOT (boss directive): primary targets are now USA, Canada, UK, Australia and Western Europe — they close faster and pay in hard currency. India moves to existing-network-only. Pricing raised to $299-499 one-time for Western markets. All future Scout cycles must weight leads accordingly and respect target-country business hours and outreach laws (CAN-SPAM/CASL/GDPR).

Agency initialized. Day-1 idea locked: WhatsApp-first booking micro-sites for local services. Pipeline target set at $2000/day proposal value with $100/day minimum revenue goal. Scout's first live lead-research cycle is scheduled; Builder and Pitcher activate when leads land.
